text.title: python-typing Output Contract
text.summary: Output schema for the agent applying this methodology: an annotated-module report with before/after counts and a list of remaining intentional ignores.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: Invalid: `errors.after` ≠ 0, missing `python_version_floor`, missing `mypy_strict`, empty `code` (must match `^[a-z-]+$`), empty `justification`.

list.item: No bare `# type: ignore` in the diff (`grep -RnE "# type: ignore($|[^[])" <module>` empty).
No `cast(` introduced in the diff unless flagged in `ignores[]` with justification.
Every `Any` survivor is documented either in `ignores[]` justification or has a TODO with a tracking ticket.
